articles.headline: Roberto Martinez steps down, says Portugal 'didn't fail'
articles.description: Roberto Martinez confirmed that he is leaving his job as Portugal coach after Monday's 1-0 World Cup round-of-16 defeat to Spain, while denying that the result was "a failure."

images.name: Martinez Portugal Spain_260706 [1296x729]
images.caption: Roberto Martinez announced he was stepping down after Portugal's loss to Spain at the World Cup.
images.alt: Roberto Martinez announced he was stepping down after Portugal's loss to Spain at the World Cup.

articles.headline: World Cup live updates: United States takes on Belgium in last 16
articles.description: Enjoy all the updates from Monday's 2026 World Cup round-of-16 match between the United States and Belgium.

articles.headline: Folarin Balogun named in starting XI for U.S. vs. Belgium
articles.description: Mauricio Pochettino handed Folarin Balogun a spot in the starting lineup for the United States in its round-of-16 match with Belgium in the FIFA World Cup on Monday in Seattle.
